biography: Olli, representing Hirsala Golf, has established himself as a distinguished competitor within the Hector Trophée. The upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will notably be his tenth appearance in this esteemed pair competition, a testament to his consistent engagement and proven mastery of the game.

Across his nine prior participations, Olli has showcased exceptional versatility, achieving the rare distinction of securing both the coveted Hector Trophée in the pair format and the prestigious Victor Trophy as an individual champion. This dual triumph underscores his profound ability to excel across the diverse challenges presented by the tournament, solidifying his standing as one of its most accomplished figures.

Known as a devoted admirer of Bryson DeChambeau, Olli approaches his golf with a similar blend of rigorous analysis and calculated power. This meticulous attention to detail and his formidable playing style consistently position him as a player of significant interest. As he prepares for his tenth challenge, Olli remains a key figure, continuously striving for further accolades in the Hector Trophée’s unfolding legacy.
